ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "totemp" INTEGER /* Total employment in the year */,
  "gnpdefl" REAL /* GNP deflator */,
  "gnp" INTEGER /* Gross National Product */,
  "unemp" INTEGER /* Unemployment in the year */,
  "armed" INTEGER /* Number of armed forces */,
  "pop" INTEGER /* Population in the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collector who recorded the data */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was entered into the system */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality of the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "data_source_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES data_collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source */,
  "source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the collector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the collector belongs to */,
  "collector_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the collector */,
  "collector_position" TEXT /* Position or role of the collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the indicator */,
  "indicator_category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator */,
  "indicator_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of indicator measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audits_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the query */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., trend analysis, forecasting) */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was performed */,
  "query_details" TEXT /* Details of the query */,
  "query_result" TEXT /* Result or output of the query */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
